perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a patterned bucket hat and a white top stands behind a silver shopping cart in a large warehouse-style store. Inside the cart are two oversized plush pillows shaped like cat heads. She smiles and gestures toward the items. (2) She lifts the large white cat plushie to her chest, demonstrating its size relative to her torso. She turns it sideways to show its thickness and squeezes the fabric. (3) She picks up both the grey and white cat plushies, holding one in each arm, and smiles towards the camera while shifting her weight and swaying slightly.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic pop music starts playing at a moderate volume. A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice begins speaking in a friendly tone. (2) The same female voice continues talking, occasionally laughing. The music maintains a constant tempo. Faint ambient warehouse noise and shuffling are heard in the background. (3) The primary female voice continues, and a second, lower-pitched female voice briefly speaks off-camera, followed by a short laugh from the main speaker as the music fades out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo at the top. Hook Text: '超可愛的 最新的' (Super cute, latest) and '迪士尼 大頭貓貓抱枕' (Disney big head cat pillows) in bold yellow/red. (2) Functional Text: '瑪麗貓、路西法只要655元' (Marie Cat, Lucifer only 655 NTD) providing pricing. (3) Decorative Text: '很有厚度' (Very thick), '很有柔順質感' (Very smooth texture), '一個是反派一個是正派' (One is a villain, one is a hero), and '都買都買' (Buy both, buy both) to create a playful and persuasive tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Size Demo -> Emotional Appeal/Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 3 female shoppers walking in the far background aisles
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a black and white patterned bucket hat, a white off-the-shoulder lace top, blue jeans, and black sandals.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with high-reaching industrial metal shelves, stacks of suitcases on pallets, and shoppers in distant aisles.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Product Feature Demo -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote a specific new product (Disney cat head pillows) available at Costco. By showing the items in a real-world shopping environment, demonstrating their physical scale and texture, and providing pricing information, the creator seeks to encourage viewers to visit the store and purchase the products.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed mention of pricing, product features, and specific store location.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy voiceover and variety-show style text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a popular social media format where influencers share 'new finds' at major retail chains to drive engagement and local foot traffic.
